childrens.name: No.8 blazer collar
childrens.nameFull: No.8 blazer collar, collar and collar face with small undercollar, collar face split seam with 0.1 plain line up and down, hook collar 2cm, vertical clip small nose 0.4cm wide at the top stop of placket, 1.7cm leakage
childrens.enFull: No.8 blazer collar, collar and collar face with small undercollar, collar face split seam with 0.1 plain line up and down, hook collar 2cm, vertical clip small nose 0.4cm wide at the top stop of placket, 1.7cm leakage

childrens.name: Unified point collar (8.8cm)
childrens.nameFull: Lapel point collar E. The hanging side strip and the inner part of the bottom collar are integrated and not disconnected (the inner part of the bottom collar and the placket are adhered with the same type of interlining). The inner part of the bottom collar is spliced with three pieces and split seams.
childrens.enFull: Lapel point collar E. The hanging side strip and the inner part of the bottom collar are integrated and not disconnected (the inner part of the bottom collar and the placket are adhered with the same type of interlining). The inner part of the bottom collar is spliced with three pieces and split seams.

childrens.name: Unified cutway collar (7.6cm)
childrens.nameFull: Eight character collar with a continuous opening between the hanging edge strip and the bottom collar (the bottom collar and the front placket are lined with the same material), with three split seams spliced together in the bottom collar
childrens.enFull: Eight character collar with a continuous opening between the hanging edge strip and the bottom collar (the bottom collar and the front placket are lined with the same material), with three split seams spliced together in the bottom collar

childrens.name: Unified square collar (8.2cm)
childrens.nameFull: A square collar G with a continuous opening between the hanging edge strip and the bottom collar (the bottom collar and the front placket are lined with the same material), with three split seams spliced together in the bottom collar
childrens.enFull: A square collar G with a continuous opening between the hanging edge strip and the bottom collar (the bottom collar and the front placket are lined with the same material), with three split seams spliced together in the bottom collar

childrens.name: Unified club collar(7.6cm)
childrens.nameFull: Collar size 40 round neck, with a hanging edge strip that seamlessly integrates with the bottom collar (the bottom collar and placket are lined with the same material), and the bottom collar is stitched together with three split seams
childrens.enFull: Collar size 40 round neck, with a hanging edge strip that seamlessly integrates with the bottom collar (the bottom collar and placket are lined with the same material), and the bottom collar is stitched together with three split seams

childrens.name: Inner welt placket (hemmed after hemming), hook 6cm lapel, and the bottom of placket is hemmed.
childrens.en: Inner welt placket (hemmed after hemming), hook 6cm lapel, and the bottom of placket is hemmed.
childrens.jap: Inner welt placket (hemmed after hemming), hook 6cm lapel, and the bottom of placket is hemmed.
childrens.nameFull: Inner welt placket (hemmed after hemming), hook 6cm lapel, and the bottom of placket is hemmed. Starting from the lapel 29cm down, press the open thread at the inner welt placket so as not to penetrate the placket surface. The buttoned nose is 29cm away from the lapel, the buttoned nose leaks 2.2CM, the buttoned nose is 10cm away from the placket, and the placket has one button. (For small square collar of western clothes, 2)
childrens.enFull: Inner welt placket (hemmed after hemming), hook 6cm lapel, and the bottom of placket is hemmed. Starting from the lapel 29cm down, press the open thread at the inner welt placket so as not to penetrate the placket surface. The buttoned nose is 29cm away from the lapel, the buttoned nose leaks 2.2CM, the buttoned nose is 10cm away from the placket, and the placket has one button. (For small square collar of western clothes, 2)
